headline: Expedia Group to Webcast Second Quarter 2026 Results on August 5, 2026
summary: SEATTLE, July 08, 2026--Expedia Group (NASDAQ: EXPE) will report its second quarter 2026 results for the period ended June 30, 2026, on Wednesday, August 5, 2026 via an earnings release and accompanying webcast. These items will be available in the Investor Relations section of the company’s corporate website at http://ir.expediagroup.com. The earnings release will post after market close and the webcast will begin at 1:30 PM Pacific Time / 4:30 PM Eastern Time. A replay of the call is expected

headline: Expedia, Booking, and Airbnb Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the morning session after President Trump declared the Iran ceasefire "over" and threatened fresh strikes, sending oil higher.
